title: Plagiobothrys hirtus
taxonomy: Plagiobothrys hirtus is classified within the family Boraginaceae. It belongs to the genus Plagiobothrys and is a species of flowering plant. The species is native to North America and is often found in sandy or gravelly areas. Plagiobothrys hirtus is a small annual herb with small white or purple flowers. It is commonly known as the hairy false flax or hairy popcorn flower.
